---
title: "NPS_building_USGWD_wells_within_park"
author: "AAF"
date: "2026-04-01"
output: html_document
---
```{r}
# 1. Load Libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(mapview)
```



```{r}
# Pull in your custom functions
source("setup.R")
```
```{r}
# 1. Set Target Park
park <- "OLYM"
# Get park boundary
pb <- getParkBoundary(park)
# 2. Create buffered AOI
aoi <- pb %>% 
  st_buffer(10000) 
# 3. Get Buildings
bldg_all <- getBuildings(park_boundary = pb) 
# 4. Get State Boundary
st <- tigris::states() %>% 
  dplyr::filter(STUSPS %in% pb$STATE)

# 5. Get Points of Interest
pois_all <- get_pois(aoi)
```

# ==========================================
# 6. DYNAMIC WELL FETCHING
# ==========================================
```{r}
state_name_fixed <- gsub(" ", "_", st$NAME)
well_file_path <- paste0("data/Water_Supply_Systems/USGWD-Tabular/USGWD_", state_name_fixed, ".csv")
# Load and crop the wells to the 10km BUFFER
aoi_wells <- read_csv(well_file_path, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Longitude) & !is.na(Latitude)) %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("Longitude", "Latitude"), crs = 4269) %>%
  st_filter(aoi %>% st_transform(4269))
```

# ==========================================
# 7. WELLS STRICTLY INSIDE THE PARK
# ==========================================
```{r}
# Take the buffer wells and cookie-cutter them again using just 'pb'
park_wells_strict <- aoi_wells %>% 
  st_filter(pb %>% st_transform(4269))
```

# ==========================================
# 8. MAP EVERYTHING
# ==========================================
```{r}
mapview(aoi, layer.name = "10km Buffer (AOI)", col.regions = "yellow", alpha.regions = 0.3) +
  mapview(pb, layer.name = "Park Boundary", col.regions = "seagreen") +
  mapview(bldg_all %>% st_centroid(), layer.name = "Buildings", col.regions = "tomato", cex = 5) +
  mapview(pois_all, layer.name = "Points of Interest", col.regions = "orange", cex = 5) +
  mapview(aoi_wells, layer.name = "Wells in 10km Buffer", col.regions = "grey", cex = 3) +
  mapview(park_wells_strict, layer.name = "Wells INSIDE Park", col.regions = "blue", cex = 4)
```

# ==========================================
# 9. SEARCH BUILDINGS BY NAME
# ==========================================
```{r}
search_str <- "chekika"

sel_bldg <- bldg_all %>%
  st_transform(4326) %>%
  st_centroid() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    X = sf::st_coordinates(.)[, 1],
    Y = sf::st_coordinates(.)[, 2]
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    grepl(search_str, MAPLABEL, ignore.case = TRUE) |
      grepl(search_str, BLDGNAME, ignore.case = TRUE) |
      grepl(search_str, BLDGALTNAM, ignore.case = TRUE) |
      grepl(search_str, BLDGTYPE, ignore.case = TRUE)
  )

mapview(sel_bldg, layer.name = "Matching Buildings") +
  mapview(pb, layer.name = "Park Boundary")
```

# ==========================================
# 10. SEARCH POINTS OF INTEREST BY NAME
# ==========================================
```{r}
search_str_poi <- "chekika"

sel_pois <- pois_all %>%
  st_transform(4326) %>%
  st_centroid() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    X = sf::st_coordinates(.)[, 1],
    Y = sf::st_coordinates(.)[, 2]
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    grepl(search_str_poi, MAPLABEL, ignore.case = TRUE) |
      grepl(search_str_poi, NOTES, ignore.case = TRUE)
  )

mapview(sel_pois, layer.name = "Matching POIs") +
  mapview(pb, layer.name = "Park Boundary")
```
